messages.text: Welcome to Arizona Veterans Leadership Council Tracker - Rate your leaders and make your voice heard!
Primary Election Day is coming - July 21, 2026

permanentMessages: Welcome to Arizona Veterans Leadership Council Tracker - Rate your leaders and make your voice heard!
